hypothesis: If scientific PDFs are preprocessed into structure-preserving markdown with GPT-4o-generated image captions and then parsed by a single-agent LLM using standardized prompts, then per-column F1 scores for end-to-end extraction on the ChemX nanozymes and chelate complex datasets will exceed those of GPT-5, GPT-5 Thinking, the ChatGPT Agent, and domain-specific multi-agent systems because preserving document structure and minimizing inter-agent coordination reduces extraction errors and improves schema compliance.
